title: pelargonium × chaerophyllum
intro: Pelargonium × chaerophyllum, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Geraniaceae family. It is valued for its fragrant leaves and flowers, which possess medicinal properties that have been used to treat various health issues. The plant's essential oil has been traditionally used to alleviate stress, anxiety, and insomnia due to its sedative and calming effects, as well as to treat digestive issues such as irritable bowel syndrome. Herbal preparations of Rose Geranium include teas, tinctures, and essential oil infusions, which can be used internally or applied topically to benefit from its medicinal properties.
